title: BTC Momentum Strategy Backtest
description: MA20/MA200 crossover strategy on BTC/USDT. After iterating through 7 versions, the best result uses golden cross entry + 10% trailing stop with flat (no shorting) — producing +58.09% return, -12.73% max drawdown, and Sharpe 1.06 vs buy & hold +5.99%. Key finding: forced shorting destroys returns in trending assets.

title: BTC-Gold Correlation Across Market Regimes
description: Empirical test of the digital gold thesis using BTCUSDT and PAXGUSDT daily data across four regimes: pre-ATH bull, post-ATH drawdown (-45.7%), Iran war, and post-ceasefire recovery. 20-day rolling correlation reveals BTC fails as a safe haven — during the post-ATH crash, gold gained +32.2% while BTC dropped -45.7%.

title: BTC CVD Divergence Filter (In Progress)
description: Extending the momentum strategy with cumulative volume delta (CVD) as a divergence filter. Current v6/v7 uses 10% trailing stop — v8 will add perp CVD + funding rates as dual entry filters. Active research project with iterative versioning and documented dead ends.

title: Gold Momentum Strategy Backtest
description: The same MA20/MA200 crossover signal applied to Gold Futures (GC=F) — and it produced exactly 0 trades over 2+ years while gold rallied from ~$2,000 to ~$4,700. A case study in why sustained bull trends break momentum signals and why asset-specific strategy design matters.
